title: LangChain - Changelog
snippet: LangChain changelog tracking updates to the framework including agent security, authentication mechanisms, and authorization features across releases.

title: Authentication and Authorization · microsoft/autogen · Discussion #4656
snippet: Discussion on authentication and authorization patterns for AutoGen agents, including AAD authentication, role-based access control, and layered security combining authentication protocols with encrypted communication.

title: New Okta Platform innovations extend Identity Security Fabric to non-human identities in an agentic AI future
snippet: Okta Platform extends end-to-end identity security fabric to non-human identities — AI agents, API keys, service accounts — with unified visibility, control, and governance.

title: Securing AI agents opportunity for identity access vendors
snippet: Okta positions agent identity as a growth opportunity. Cross App Access (XAA) protocol brings app-to-app and AI agent connections under centralized identity control with policy-driven security.

title: A Novel Zero-Trust Identity Framework for Agentic AI: Decentralized Authentication and Fine-Grained Access Control
snippet: Presents a zero-trust identity framework for agentic AI using decentralized identifiers and verifiable credentials for authentication and fine-grained access control of AI agents.
source_query: W3C DID verifiable credentials AI agents

title: Stripe partners with AWS to power AgentCore payments with Privy
snippet: AWS AgentCore payments enables AI agents to instantly access and pay for resources, with Privy providing wallet infrastructure and Stripe handling payment rails.

title: Crypto Wallets Just Got Rebuilt for a World Run by AI
snippet: Covers the 2026 shift to machine-native agentic wallets capable of self-identification, reputation building, and trustless payments — featuring Privy, Coinbase, Human.tech, and TON agentic wallet infrastructure for AI agents.
